sql: SELECT FLOOR((1998 - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(c.birth_date AS DATE))) / 5) * 5 AS age_bucket_start, COUNT(*) AS client_count FROM client c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1; SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS client_count FROM client GROUP BY gender ORDER BY gender; SELECT c.client_id, 1998 - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(c.birth_date AS DATE)) AS age_years, l.amount AS loan_amount FROM client c JOIN disp dp ON dp.client_id=c.client_id JOIN account a ON a.account_id=dp.account_id JOIN loan l ON l.account_id=a.account_id; SELECT d.A2 AS district, COUNT(c.client_id) AS client_count FROM client c JOIN district d ON d.district_id=c.district_id GROUP BY d.A2 ORDER BY client_count DESC LIMIT 10;

chart_spec.layout_intent: Demographic overview with distribution charts at the top and scatter plus district ranking below.
